metadata.title: vocalmapp
metadata.description: A private workspace for mapping lyrics, vocal markers, and reference audio.

common.localDataDetected: Local browser data was detected from the previous prototype. New changes are saved to Supabase.

auth.title: Create an account or log in
auth.subtitle: Join your private vocal workspace.
auth.continueNote: By continuing, you agree to sign in securely.
auth.googleSignInError: Google sign-in could not start. Try again in a moment.
auth.codeSentBody: We sent a sign-in code to {email}. Keep this tab open and enter the newest code below.
auth.codeHelp: Enter the newest code sent to {email}. Requesting another code cancels the previous one.
auth.invalidCode: Enter the numeric code from your email.
auth.codeSendError: We could not send the sign-in code. Try again in a moment.
auth.codeRateLimitError: Supabase has temporarily rate-limited email codes for this address. Wait a few minutes, then request a new code.
auth.codeUnauthorizedEmailError: Supabase is refusing email sign-up or sign-in for this address. Check that email signups are enabled in Supabase Auth.
auth.codeSmtpError: Supabase could not hand this email to the SMTP provider. Check the Supabase Auth SMTP settings and the Resend delivery logs.
auth.codeVerifyError: The code is incorrect or has expired. Request a new code and try again.
auth.productionNote: Supabase Auth must use email templates with the one-time token. For repeated testing or production, configure custom SMTP to avoid the default sender limits.

app.spotifyMissing: Spotify is not configured. Showing LRCLIB results without album art.
app.spotifyUnavailable: Spotify is unavailable. Showing LRCLIB results.
app.spotifySearchUnavailable: Search is unavailable. You can add a song manually.
app.spotifyNoResults: No songs found. Try adding an artist name.
app.spotifyMissingCredentials: Spotify is not configured. Add SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID and SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET to the server environment.
app.queryRequired: Enter a song title or artist.
app.lyricsFound: Lyrics found. Review them before saving.
app.syncedLyricsFound: Synced lyrics were found. Timestamps were removed for markup.
app.lyricsNotFound: Lyrics were not found. Paste lyrics manually.
app.lyricsFetchFailed: Lyrics could not be loaded. Paste lyrics manually.
app.markerPanelHint: Choose a marker to edit or hide it.
app.confirmDeleteMarker: Delete "{label}" and remove it from songs?
app.confirmHideSystemMarker: Hide default marker "{label}" from your marker list?
app.lyricsPlaceholder: Paste lyrics. Each line and each word becomes clickable.
app.confirmDeleteSong: Delete "{title}" with its markers and audio?
app.audioBoxHelp: Add a private local practice file alongside the lyrics.
app.emptyDocument: Add lyrics to start marking up this song.
app.emptyWorkspaceBody: Find a song, paste lyrics, then add colored vocal markers and reference audio to lines or words.
app.unsupportedRecording: This browser does not support audio recording.
app.audioMissing: Audio file was not found in Supabase Storage.
app.saveFailed: Changes could not be saved. Try again.
app.markersCount: {count, plural, one {# marked place} other {# marked places}}
app.profileSubtitle: Choose a nickname and add a short vocal focus.
app.profileNameRequired: Add a nickname with at least 2 characters.
app.profileSaveFailed: Profile could not be saved. Try again.

mute.label: Mute
mute.meaning: Sing quieter or remove extra sound

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you requested does not exist.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: Refresh the page or return to the dashboard.
